productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max+ 2011 Grey  Sports Shoes
description: The nike Air Max+ 2011 shoe is a take off on the popular Air Max shoe. What makes this version even better is the Hyperfuse upper, which combines several materials that together offer an absolutely lightweight, breathable comfort, durability and a seamless Fit. Upper Hyperfuse upper for absolute lightweight, breathable and durable comfort Inner bootie that wraps around the foot offering breathable, snug comfort Meshed and padded tongue and inner sleeve with a lace-up system for snug fit and comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort Swoosh overlays on the sides for enhanced shoe structure Reflective material on the toe and heel region for easy visibility in low light conditions Midsole Full length Cushlon midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorption Max Air technology for maximum impact protection Moulded collar around the ankle to lock the heel in place and reduce slippage Outsole Durable rubber outsole with waffle pattern and lugs around the perimeter for absolute grip and traction Coloured Air Max unit with a translucent perimeter on the outsole for style Flex grooves for smooth flexibility and an efficient transition from heel to toe nike+ Ready which makes it compatible with various Nike+ products Shoe care Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
